summary: First-finish smoke test of SOULBOUND MVP. Backend (8 endpoints) and frontend (main menu, level select, game page, pause, upload) all functional. Minor: story-intro overlay not visible on entering game page (likely because elena's song was deleted during backend test earlier, and/or intro auto-dismissed) — game still renders canvas + HUD and status label 'PRESS SPACE TO BEGIN'. hud-song-progress hidden when no song bound (expected). All 5 level cards, all 5 upload rows, pause overlay (button + ESC toggle), and song upload flow all verified working.
passed: GET /api/levels returns 5 levels with all required fields (id, name, role, life_theme, palette, default_song_seconds, song=null)
POST /api/scores persists score and returns id + created_at
GET /api/scores/elena-painter returns just-posted score sorted by completion_time_seconds
GET /api/songs/elena-painter/audio returns audio bytes with content-type audio/wav
GET /api/levels shows song info (duration=45.5, url, original_name) after upload
DELETE /api/songs/elena-painter returns ok=true; subsequent GET audio returns 404
Main Menu (/) shows SOULBOUND title + menu-play-btn, menu-levels-btn, menu-upload-btn
Level Select (/levels) shows all 5 level-card-<id> tiles; clicking navigates to /play/<id>
Game page /play/elena-painter renders game-canvas, hud-character-name, hud-collected, hud-pause-btn
hud-pause-btn opens pause-overlay with resume-btn, restart-btn, quit-btn; ESC toggles pause overlay open/close
Upload page (/upload) shows all 5 upload-btn-<id> + upload-input-<id> rows; uploading test.wav to elena updates row with 'Bound: test.wav', PREVIEW/REMOVE/REPLACE buttons

failed.issue: story-intro and story-begin-btn were not visible on initial navigation to /play/elena-painter. Game still functional (canvas + HUD render, status shows 'PRESS SPACE TO BEGIN'). May be conditional on song presence or session flag.
failed.evidence: playwright: is_visible() returned False for both story-intro and story-begin-btn immediately after navigation. Canvas + HUD rendered fine.

failed.issue: hud-song-progress not visible on game page. Likely intentional (no song was bound to elena at that moment since backend test deleted it). Recommend confirming whether progress bar should still render at 0% when no song is bound.
failed.evidence: playwright: hud-song-progress is_visible()=False; other HUD elements visible.

action_items: Confirm intended behavior of story-intro overlay — should it always show on first visit, or is it conditional?
Confirm whether hud-song-progress should render (empty) when no song is bound to a level
